overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game. A character in a cowboy hat and coat walks through a rural frontier town at night, transitioning from a fenced backyard with a campfire, through a narrow covered alleyway between wooden buildings, and onto the main dirt street illuminated by gas lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced backyard with trees and campfire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a fenced yard toward a burning campfire

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fence running along the left side of the path
weathered wooden picket fence running along the right side of the path
tall trees with sparse autumn foliage silhouetted against the night sky
burning campfire with visible flames and glowing embers
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open fenced yard at night, flanked by wooden fences on both sides. Trees with autumn foliage frame the scene, and a campfire burns in the distance. The ground is dirt with patches of grass, and wooden crates are stacked near the right fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden buildings with canvas awning

events.description: leaving the open yard and approaching the wooden buildings and alley entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the narrow passage between wooden structures, moving toward the canvas awning

entered.detail: large beige canvas canopy stretched between buildings providing cover
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked near the building
two-story wooden structure with lit windows and weathered siding

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open yard behind and approaches a cluster of wooden buildings. A large canvas awning stretches overhead, and a wooden cart sits parked on the right. The wooden fence continues on the left but recedes into the distance as the path narrows between structures.

events.description: entering the covered alleyway with warm artificial lantern lighting replacing the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage with wooden walls on both sides

entered.detail: roofed wooden corridor with exposed overhead beams and planks
lit oil lantern hanging from the ceiling providing warm yellow light
rough wooden plank walls of the adjacent building
stacked wooden barrels lining the left side of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered walkway between buildings, illuminated by hanging oil lanterns. The space is enclosed with wooden walls and a roof overhead, blocking the sky completely. Wooden barrels line the left side, and the ground is made of wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with wooden sidewalks and gas lamps

events.description: exiting the covered alley onto the open main street with buildings lining both sides
NPC townspeople become visible standing on the porch of a building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the main dirt street lined with wooden buildings and street lamps

notable_agents.action: two townspeople standing on the wooden porch near the building entrance

entered.detail: large two-story wooden building with covered porch and decorative columns
wide dirt street with visible wagon ruts and muddy patches
tall cast-iron gas lamp post with warm glowing light
wooden utility pole with crossbars and insulators
metal fire pit with burning coals on the street corner

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered alley, the character steps onto the main street of a frontier town. The street is lined with wooden buildings including a prominent saloon on the right, illuminated by gas street lamps. The dirt road stretches ahead with telegraph poles lining the left side, and NPCs can be seen standing on a porch in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded nighttime yard into the illuminated main street of a frontier town. It begins by following the character through an open fenced yard with autumn foliage and a distant campfire, moving past stacked wooden crates on a dirt path. As the character approaches a cluster of buildings, the open space narrows under a large canvas awning and beside a parked wooden cart. The scene then shifts into a confined, covered walkway where the sky is blocked by a roof and the path transitions to wooden planks illuminated by hanging oil lanterns. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley onto a wide dirt road lined with telegraph poles and gas lamps, opening up to reveal a prominent saloon and distant figures on a porch.
